title: sonchus picroides
intro: Sonchus picroides, also known as the prickly spheroclonium or prickly lettuce, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sonchus picroides are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Sonchus picroides is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
